Mark Garnier
for Wyre Forest

In Parliament

  • Tweet

Mark in Parliament

  • Minister for Investment, Department for International Trade 2016-2018

  • Trade Envoy to Burma, Brunei and Thailand 2016

  • Member of the Treasury Select Committee 2010-2016

  • Member of the Parliamentary Commission on Banking Standards 2012-2014

  • Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group for Heritage Rail - 2016

  • Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group for the Carpet Industry - 2016

  • Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group for Sailing and Marine Business - 2016

  • Co-Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group for the Economy in the West Midlands -2016

  • Vice Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group for Space

 

Below you can read Mark's recent appearances and speeches in Parliament.
